ReinstallInstances.action: Action to perform on the instance; current value: rebuild
ReinstallInstances.adminPass: Instance password (must be encrypted per [Password Encryption Spec](BCC/API参考/通用说明.md#密码加密传输规范)); either adminPass or keypairId is required
ReinstallInstances.keypairId: Key pair ID to bind to the reinstalled instance; either adminPass or keypairId is required
ReinstallInstances.keepImageLogin:
Whether to use the image preset password; default: false. true: use image preset password; false: do not use it.
1. If true, password and keypairId must be empty.
2. Only supported for custom or shared images.
ReinstallInstances.userData: Custom script for the reinstalled instance
ReinstallInstances.cleanLastUserData: Clear historical userData; default false (i.e., retain historical userData including GPU drivers and CFS filesystem)
ReinstallInstances.isOpenHostEye: Whether to enable host security; default true
ReinstallInstances.sysRootSize: System disk size; applies to EBC instances only
ReinstallInstances.isPreserveData: Applies to EBC instance local disks only. Whether to preserve data during reinstallation; when true, raidId and sysRootSize are ignored
ReinstallInstances.raidId: RAID configuration ID; applies to EBC instances only. Required when isPreserveData is false; ignored when isPreserveData is true
ReinstallInstances.dataPartitionType: Data disk partition format; applies to EBC instances only
ReinstallInstances.rootPartitionType: System disk partition format; applies to EBC instances only
